messages.content:
Stage 2 Contributor Network is now live.

The Contributor Network for Stage 2 of the Mathematics Distillation Challenge - Equational Theories is now open:

https://competition.sair.foundation/contributor-network?competition=mathematics-distillation-challenge-equational-theories-stage2

This is a space for participants to share solvers, tools, ideas, and progress with the community. We hope it will help facilitate open collaboration, shared learning, and collective progress throughout Stage 2.
messages.subject: Stage 2 Contributor Network
